name: James E. Davis
title: Chairman, Chief Executive Officer and President
description: Leads the overall strategic direction, operations, and performance of Quest Diagnostics as the company's top executive.

name: Sam A. Samad
title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
description: Oversees the company's financial strategy, planning, reporting, and investor relations.

name: Catherine T. Doherty
title: Executive Vice President and Group President, Physician and Consumer Solutions
description: Leads the physician and consumer-facing diagnostic solutions business segment.

name: James B. Hayden
title: Executive Vice President and Chief Information Officer
description: Responsible for the company's information technology strategy, infrastructure, and digital transformation initiatives.

name: Cecilia McKenney
title: Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer
description: Oversees human resources strategy, talent management, and employee engagement across the organization.

name: Michael E. Prevoznik
title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel
description: Manages all legal affairs, compliance, and regulatory matters for the company.

name: Shawn Bevec
title: Executive Vice President and Group President, Hospital and Health System Solutions
description: Leads the hospital and health system business segment, driving partnerships and revenue in that channel.

name: Rupert Bondy
title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer
description: Provides legal counsel and oversees compliance programs across Quest Diagnostics.

name: Mark Guinan
title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
description: Previously served as CFO overseeing financial operations; role may have transitioned to Sam Samad.

name: Jeffrey Shao
title: Senior Vice President, Chief Science Officer
description: Directs the scientific and medical strategy, test innovation, and laboratory science initiatives.
